desc: Hero dish: grilled octopus on the slate plate, overhead and 3/4 angles.
name: Grilled octopus hero plate

desc: Cover-candidate flat lay of the citrus dessert spread for the feature opener.
name: Citrus dessert flat lay

desc: Oat milk pour shot — splash and steam, backlit on the marble surface.
name: Oat milk pour shot

desc: Props: matte ceramic bowls, linen napkins, the dark walnut board from the prop kit.
name: Prop list — ceramics and linens

desc: Styling: chef's hands tearing bread, shallow depth, natural window light.
name: Hands tearing bread detail

desc: Lifestyle: barista latte art using the oat milk, café table setting.
name: Latte art lifestyle frame

desc: Reshoot the seafood rice — last take was underexposed in the shadows.
name: Reshoot seafood rice

desc: Pull background tiles and surfaces for the editorial spread — confirm with the stylist.
name: Background surfaces and tiles

desc: Source the branded glasses and packaging from Oatly for the product hero set.
name: Source branded glassware

desc: Cull and select final 12 frames for the Estrela cookbook chapter.
name: Select final chapter frames

desc: Confirm crop and bleed for the magazine layout before delivering to Tangerine.
name: Confirm crop and bleed

desc: Export and deliver retouched product files to Oatly's brand manager.
name: Deliver retouched product files
